subject: Corphish, the rogue crustacean Pokemon, mid-leap with pincers raised
description: A small orange crab-like Pokemon leaps forward with both large white pincers spread wide, mouth open in an energetic expression. The creature is caught mid-jump over what appears to be a rocky or muddy riverbank surface. The background is lush green forest foliage bathed in warm dappled sunlight, suggesting a wild riverside environment. The overall palette is warm orange and cream against deep greens and golden light, giving the scene a bright and spirited outdoor feel.
foreground: orange and white crustacean creature mid-leap, pincers raised
background: dense green foliage, dappled forest light, earthy ground
emotion: energetic, aggressive leap — mouth open, pincers spread wide
